title: Damage Tick
description: Increases the tick rate by 2 every time you take damage
body:
# Damage Tick
**Requires the [TickLowerPerm](https://modrinth.com/mod/ticklowerperm) mod to work!**

Increases the tick rate by 2 every time you take damage.  

Uses a .js script to dynamically generate the function to translate scoreboard > tick commands.  
This is due to the limitations of the /tick commands in it's current state, thus also the need for TickLowerPerm.
